content: Hi, I'm Finley and I'm a startup founder. I've been working on my company for the past 2 years and we're currently in the pre-seed stage.
Hi Finley! It's nice to meet you. What kind of startup are you working on?

We're working on AI tools for businesses. It's been a challenging but rewarding experience so far. I've been putting in a lot of long hours, but I'm hoping it will pay off in the end. I'm currently living in Lisbon, Portugal and I love it here.
That sounds like a great idea! AI is a rapidly growing field. How do you like to relax and unwind after a long day of work?
I love doing origami and woodworking. It's a great way for me to clear my mind and express myself creatively. I've also been getting into 3D printing and I find it really fascinating.
That sounds like a great hobby! Have you thought about combining your love of technology and animals in any way, maybe through a project or volunteer program?
Actually, that's not a bad idea. I've been thinking about working on a project that uses AI to help animals in need. I've been talking to my friend, Sofia, about helping me get started.
That's a wonderful idea! I'm sure it will be a great way for you to use your skills to make a positive impact. What kind of animals are you interested in helping?

I'm interested in helping all kinds of animals, but if I had to choose, I'd say dogs are my favorite. I've been thinking of getting a dog soon, maybe a labrador retriever. My parents are getting older and I've been taking care of them, so I think a dog would be a great companion for all of us.
That's a great idea! Dogs can be wonderful companions for families. Have you thought about how you'll balance your work and caregiving responsibilities with having a new pet?

Yeah, I've been thinking about that a lot. I'll need to make sure I have enough time for my new pet, but I'm hoping it will be worth it in the end. I'm planning to take a break from work on October 15th to focus on my parents and my new pet.
That's a great plan! It's important to prioritize your family and your own well-being. I'm sure everything will work out for the best.
